headline: Man Uses 47 Different Ways To Say 'No' In One Conversation, Confuses Everyone
summary: 'No,' 'not really,' 'I don't think so,' 'perhaps not,' 'I'll pass.' The list goes on.
fullBody: Jake said 'no' 47 different ways in one conversation. 'No,' Jake said. 'Not really.' 'I don't think so.' 'Perhaps not.' 'I'll pass.' The other person was confused. 'Is that a no?' they asked. 'It's complicated,' Jake said. His friends have started a 'Jake Says No' bingo card. 'He never says yes,' one said. 'He says 'I'll consider it.'' That's also a no.
